mainDressCode.title: Dress Code
mainDressCode.description:
To complement the color motif of our celebration, we kindly request our guests to dress in formal or semi-formal attire in any of the following shades: Champagne, Dark Beige, Taupe, Dusty Blue, Mocha, Burgundy, Light Terracotta, or Sage Green.

Ladies: Floor-length or long dresses
Gentlemen: Long-sleeved dress shirt with trousers or slacks

sections.title: FORMAL ATTIRE
sections.description: To complement the color motif of our celebration, we kindly request our guests to dress in formal or semi-formal attire.
